title: Plan, prepare and conduct mulesing procedures
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Plan, prepare and conduct mulesing procedures demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Conduct pre-mulesing evaluations

pcs.text: Identify and comply with relevant legislation, regulations and animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and comply with relevant legislation, regulations and animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and comply with relevant legislation, regulations and animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Identify industry standards and guidelines
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify industry standards and guidelines?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify industry standards and guidelines.

pcs.text: Seek expert advice and discuss alternative strategies to manage flystrike susceptibility prior to undertaking mulesing procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Seek expert advice and discuss alternative strategies to manage flystrike susceptibility prior to undertaking mulesing procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Seek expert advice and discuss alternative strategies to manage flystrike susceptibility prior to undertaking mulesing procedures.

pcs.text: Confirm workplace requirements for use of mulesing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm workplace requirements for use of mulesing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm workplace requirements for use of mulesing.

pcs.text: Conduct pre-operative evaluation of sheep
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct pre-operative evaluation of sheep?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct pre-operative evaluation of sheep.

pcs.text: Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to manage risks.

pcs.text: Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, fit, use and maintain personal protective equipment (PPE) applicable to the task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Conduct pre-mulesing evaluations

elements.title: Prepare for mulesing operations

pcs.text: Identify and order supplies and equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and order supplies and equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and order supplies and equipment.

pcs.text: Monitor weather conditions to determine optimal conditions for operation and recovery of sheep from the procedure
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor weather conditions to determine optimal conditions for operation and recovery of sheep from the procedure?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor weather conditions to determine optimal conditions for operation and recovery of sheep from the procedure.

pcs.text: Select suitable time of day for operation to minimise the separation time of lambs and ewes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select suitable time of day for operation to minimise the separation time of lambs and ewes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select suitable time of day for operation to minimise the separation time of lambs and ewes.

pcs.text: Engage skilled workers to perform mulesing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Engage skilled workers to perform mulesing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Engage skilled workers to perform mulesing.

pcs.text: Select appropriate yards, paddocks and pastures for each mob and each day to allow adequate time for mothering-up of lambs after separation from the ewes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate yards, paddocks and pastures for each mob and each day to allow adequate time for mothering-up of lambs after separation from the ewes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate yards, paddocks and pastures for each mob and each day to allow adequate time for mothering-up of lambs after separation from the ewes.

pcs.text: Muster, move and handle sheep using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Muster, move and handle sheep using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Muster, move and handle sheep using good stock handling techniques and according to workplace animal welfare practices.

pcs.text: Allow lambs to settle and cool after yarding
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allow lambs to settle and cool after yarding?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allow lambs to settle and cool after yarding.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare for mulesing operations

elements.title: Select, maintain and use appropriate equipment

pcs.text: Maintain equipment in clean, hygienic and good working order to reduce the risk of infection and cross-infection in sheep
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain equipment in clean, hygienic and good working order to reduce the risk of infection and cross-infection in sheep?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain equipment in clean, hygienic and good working order to reduce the risk of infection and cross-infection in sheep.

pcs.text: Maintain and operate mulesing cradles in good working condition to ensure minimal risk to the operator or lamb, especially when loading and unloading
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain and operate mulesing cradles in good working condition to ensure minimal risk to the operator or lamb, especially when loading and unloading?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain and operate mulesing cradles in good working condition to ensure minimal risk to the operator or lamb, especially when loading and unloading.

pcs.text: Set, grind and sharpen mulesing shears according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Set, grind and sharpen mulesing shears according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Set, grind and sharpen mulesing shears according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Disinfect mulesing shears after sharpening, before use and between each animal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Disinfect mulesing shears after sharpening, before use and between each animal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Disinfect mulesing shears after sharpening, before use and between each animal.

pcs.text: Prepare wash-down, soaking and disinfecting containers for use
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare wash-down, soaking and disinfecting containers for use?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare wash-down, soaking and disinfecting containers for use.

pcs.text: Prepare, test and check chemical application equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare, test and check chemical application equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare, test and check chemical application equipment.

pcs.text: Clean, disinfect and store equipment at the end of operation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, disinfect and store equipment at the end of operation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, disinfect and store equipment at the end of operation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Select, maintain and use appropriate equipment

elements.title: Conduct mulesing procedures

pcs.text: Conduct all procedures according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare and biosecurity requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct all procedures according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare and biosecurity requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct all procedures according to workplace health and safety, animal welfare and biosecurity requirements.

pcs.text: Maintain facility, operator hands, handling and equipment hygiene throughout the operation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain facility, operator hands, handling and equipment hygiene throughout the operation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain facility, operator hands, handling and equipment hygiene throughout the operation.

pcs.text: Handle lambs using good stock handling techniques and use restraints such as cradles
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Handle lambs using good stock handling techniques and use restraints such as cradles?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Handle lambs using good stock handling techniques and use restraints such as cradles.

pcs.text: Perform mulesing procedure according to model code of practice and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform mulesing procedure according to model code of practice and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform mulesing procedure according to model code of practice and industry standards.

pcs.text: Apply pain relief to the wound immediately after the procedure according to industry standards and legislative requirements, and Safety Data Sheet (SDS) instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply pain relief to the wound immediately after the procedure according to industry standards and legislative requirements, and Safety Data Sheet (SDS) instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply pain relief to the wound immediately after the procedure according to industry standards and legislative requirements, and Safety Data Sheet (SDS) instructions.

pcs.text: Apply insecticide dressing to the surrounding intact wool-bearing skin immediately after the procedure according to industry standards and SDS instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Apply insecticide dressing to the surrounding intact wool-bearing skin immediately after the procedure according to industry standards and SDS instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Apply insecticide dressing to the surrounding intact wool-bearing skin immediately after the procedure according to industry standards and SDS instructions.

pcs.text: Monitor and evaluate wound symmetry, size and position, and breaks in selvage
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor and evaluate wound symmetry, size and position, and breaks in selvage?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor and evaluate wound symmetry, size and position, and breaks in selvage.

pcs.text: Remove lambs from cradles so they land gently on all four feet
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove lambs from cradles so they land gently on all four feet?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove lambs from cradles so they land gently on all four feet.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Conduct mulesing procedures

elements.title: Conduct post-mulesing management procedures

pcs.text: Allow lambs, following release, to mother-up to ewes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allow lambs, following release, to mother-up to ewes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allow lambs, following release, to mother-up to ewes.

pcs.text: Provide immediate treatment for lambs that are abandoned or unable to stand or walk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Provide immediate treatment for lambs that are abandoned or unable to stand or walk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Provide immediate treatment for lambs that are abandoned or unable to stand or walk.

pcs.text: Monitor lambs for abnormal signs such as infection and septicaemia
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor lambs for abnormal signs such as infection and septicaemia?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor lambs for abnormal signs such as infection and septicaemia.

pcs.text: Complete mulesing documentation and records according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete mulesing documentation and records according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete mulesing documentation and records according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable equipment and PPE according to workplace procedures.
